duck_flies_away: The duck escapes into the sky! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
The duck flaps away, living another day. В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< The duck disappears into the distance.
The duck takes flight and vanishes! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
fast_duck_flies_away: The fast duck quickly flies away! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< *ZOOM* The speedy duck vanishes in a flash!
The fast duck zips away at lightning speed! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< Too slow! The fast duck has already escaped!
The swift duck darts away before you can blink! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
golden_duck_flies_away: The {gold}golden duck{reset} flies away majestically. В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< The {gold}golden duck{reset} glides away gracefully, its feathers shimmering.
The precious {gold}golden duck{reset} escapes to safety! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< The {gold}golden duck{reset} spreads its magnificent wings and soars away.
The valuable {gold}golden duck{reset} disappears into the sunset! В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
\o< *glimmer* The {gold}golden duck{reset} vanishes like a treasure in the wind.
bang_hit: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the duck for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. \_X<   *KWAK*  {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset} [Total ducks: {ducks_shot}]
bang_hit_golden: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the {gold}GOLDEN DUCK{reset} for 1 damage! It has {hp_remaining} HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset} [Total ducks: {ducks_shot}]
bang_hit_golden_killed: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the {gold}GOLDEN DUCK{reset} for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset} [Total ducks: {ducks_shot}]
bang_hit_fast: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the FAST DUCK for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset} [Total ducks: {ducks_shot}]
bang_cooldown: {nick} > *click* You're trying to shoot too fast! Calm down and aim.
bang_friendly_fire_penalty: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You missed and hit {victim}! {red}[GUN CONFISCATED]{reset} [LOST {xp_lost} XP]
bang_friendly_fire_insured: {nick} > *BANG* You missed and hit {victim}! {green}[INSURANCE PROTECTED - No penalties]{reset}
bang_no_duck: {nick} > *BANG* What did you shoot at? There is no duck in the area... {red}[GUN CONFISCATED]{reset}
bang_not_armed: {nick} > Your gun has been confiscated. Buy it back from the shop.
bef_success: {nick} > *befriend* You befriended the duck! [+{xp_gained} xp] [Ducks befriended: {ducks_befriended}]
bef_failed: {nick} > *gentle approach* The duck doesn't trust you.
bef_no_duck: {nick} > *gentle approach* There is no duck to befriend in the area...
bef_duck_shot: {nick} > *gentle approach* The duck is already dead! You can't befriend it now...
help_user_commands: !bang - Shoot at ducks | !bef - Befriend ducks | !reload - Reload your gun | !shop - View/buy from shop | !duckstats - View your stats and items | !topduck - View leaderboards | !use - Use inventory items | !give - Give items to other players
admin_rearm_all: [ADMIN] All players have been rearmed by {admin}
admin_ducklaunch: [ADMIN] A duck has been launched by {admin}
admin_ducklaunch_not_enabled: [ADMIN] This channel is not enabled for duckhunt
shop_buy_insufficient_xp: {nick} > You don't have enough XP to buy {item_name}. Need {price} XP, you have {current_xp} XP.
shop_buy_invalid_id: {nick} > Invalid item ID. Use !shop to see available items.
use_attract_ducks: {nick} > You scattered bread around the pond! Ducks will spawn {spawn_multiplier}x faster for {duration} minutes.
use_insurance: {nick} > You activated Hunter's Insurance! Protected from friendly fire penalties for {duration} hours.
use_buy_gun_back: {nick} > Your gun has been returned with {ammo_restored} bullets. You now have {total_spares} spare magazines available.
bang_wet_clothes: {nick} > *SPLASH* Your clothes are soaked! You can't shoot until you dry off or buy new clothes.
use_splash_water: {nick} > *SPLASH* You soaked {target_nick} with water! They can't shoot for {duration} minutes.
use_dry_clothes: {nick} > You changed into dry clothes! Ready to hunt again.
use_dry_clothes_not_needed: {nick} > You weren't wet - no need for new clothes.
gift_ammo: {nick} > Gave {amount} bullet(s) to {target_nick}! What a generous hunter.
gift_magazine: {nick} > Gave 1 magazine to {target_nick}! Sharing the ammo love.
gift_gun_brush: {nick} > Gave a gun brush to {target_nick} - keeping their weapon clean!
gift_insurance: {nick} > Gave Hunter's Insurance to {target_nick} - protecting them from friendly fire!
gift_dry_clothes: {nick} > Gave dry clothes to {target_nick} - now they can stay dry!
gift_buy_gun_back: {nick} > Gave a gun license to {target_nick} - helping them get their gun back!
duck_drop_normal: {nick} > The duck dropped a {green}{item_name}{reset}! [Added to inventory]
duck_drop_fast: {nick} > The {cyan}fast duck{reset} dropped a {green}{item_name}{reset}! [Added to inventory]
duck_drop_golden: {nick} > The {gold}golden duck{reset} dropped a {green}{item_name}{reset}! [Added to inventory]
boss_duck_spawn: рџ’Ђ A BOSS DUCK has appeared with {hp} HP! Everyone !bang to take it down!
duck_flock: рџ¦†рџ¦†рџ¦† A flock of {count} ducks has landed! Type !bang to pick them off!
weather_change: рџЊ¤пёЏ Weather update: It is now {weather_name}!
rate_limited: {nick} > You're doing that too quickly вЂ” slow down!
boss_duck_flies_away: The massive boss duck effortlessly takes off and disappears into the clouds. В·В°'`'В°-.,ВёВё.В·В°'`
ninja_duck_flies_away: The ninja duck drops a smoke bomb and vanishes! *poof*
decoy_duck_flies_away: The wooden decoy duck... somehow flew away? Was it pulled by a string?
bang_hit_boss: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the BOSS DUCK for 1 damage! It has {hp_remaining} HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset}
bang_hit_boss_killed: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the BOSS DUCK for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset}
bang_hit_ninja: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit the ninja duck for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset}
bang_hit_flock: {nick} > {red}*BANG*{reset} You hit a duck in the flock for 1 damage! It has 0 HP left. {green}[+{xp_gained} xp]{reset}
bang_decoy: {nick} > *CLANG* That was a wooden decoy! The warden heard the noise and confiscated your gun! {red}[GUN CONFISCATED]{reset}
bang_ninja_dodge: {nick} > *SWISH* The ninja duck effortlessly dodged your shot! {red}[-1 XP]{reset}
bang_miss_armored: {nick} > *BANG* You missed... but your {green}Body Armor{reset} absorbed the penalty!
bef_decoy: {nick} > You gently pat the wooden decoy duck. Wait, there's a {green}{xp_gained} XP{reset} coin hidden inside!
bef_trapped: {nick} > *SNAP* You reached out, but {set_by} set a Decoy Trap! {red}[LOST {xp_lost} XP]{reset}
bef_boss_not_interested: {nick} > The massive boss duck glares at you. It has no interest in being your friend.
